title: The Queer Querulous Quail
content:
The Queer Querulous Quail,
    who smoked a Pipe of tobacco on the top of
    a Tin Tea-kettle.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "The Queer Querulous Quail"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
